# Doc Architecture Model Skill — Examples
## 1. Minimal DAM Structure
```markdown
# Documentation
- Overview
- Getting Started
- API Reference
- Guides
- FAQ
```
## 2. Lint Docs (Python)
```text
python tools/doc-lint.py docs/
```
## 3. Link Checker (Node.js)
```sh
node tools/link-checker.mjs docs/
```
